entity.summary: Solana proprietary-market-maker decentralized exchange with active spot-swap volume, protocol fee generation, revenue, and a first-party ecosystem interface and liquidity leaderboard.
entity.notes: Current first-party HumidiFi site exposes a live liquidity leaderboard and links its Aquarium on-chain-liquidity product. DefiLlama identifies HumidiFi as a Solana Prop AMM and reports substantial current 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume together with fees and revenue.

evidence.title: HumidiFi official website and liquidity leaderboard
evidence.notes: Current first-party site exposes wallet-level liquidity leaderboard activity and links the live Aquarium on-chain liquidity product.

evidence.title: HumidiFi metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies HumidiFi as a Solana Prop AMM and reports substantial current DEX volume plus current fees and revenue, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: HumidiFi DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies HumidiFi as a Solana decentralized exchange and corroborates the protocol identity.
